generated_oml:
// C1: System Under Study
instance AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "A 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted for adaptive cruise control (ACC) functionality using a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium physical twin with autonomy components including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller. Operates with NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK and ROS2 middleware for integration of Python 3.8, C++, and MATLAB/Simulink modules."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment DigitalTwinEnvironment, PhysicalTwinEnvironment
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modified Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle serving as the physical twin with lower-level chassis for steering/speed control and upper-level chassis hosting autonomy components."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEnvironment
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical chassis component handling steering servo actuation and speed control via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
    base:isContainedIn TraxxasSlash4x4PhysicalTwin
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical chassis component hosting autonomy elements including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Jetson NX antenna, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera."
    base:isContainedIn TraxxasSlash4x4PhysicalTwin
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for speed control actuation."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles directional control through the lower-level chassis interface."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance EmergencyBrakingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking functionality triggered via Digital Twin's Actuation Functional Entity in Physical Twin Entity (custom ISO 23247 extension)."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental mapping and object detection sensor using LiDAR technology."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Visual perception and object tracking depth camera providing RGB-D data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors measuring ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle integrated into lower-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for real-time sensor data fusion and processing using NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK."
    base:isContainedIn UpperLevelChassis
]

instance JetsonNxAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for wireless communication between physical and digital twins."
    base:isContainedIn UpperLevelChassis
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "RGB-D camera data from Intel Deepsense D435i transmitted via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) transmitted from onboard sensors via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance SensorFusionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Processed sensor fusion data combining LiDAR and camera inputs into object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN clustering for raw LiDAR point clouds and Kalman filtering for object state tracking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataFusionEnabler
]

instance AccControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements performance class I ACC (ISO 15622) with distance-based speed adjustment control logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlLogicEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured representation of ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler, AccControlLogicEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks containing position and velocity information derived from sensor fusion."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorFusionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed projected driving path based on object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData, EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL-based storage of time-series vehicle state and object tracks data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for intra-system communication between physical twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

instance WiFiCommunicationProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi protocol for inter-entity communication between physical twin and digital twin."
]

instance Jetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson Orin Nano development and sensor integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataFusionEnabler
]

instance Python38Development : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime environment for implementing application modules."
]

instance CppDevelopment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ development environment for performance-critical components."
]

instance MatlabSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems implementation like point cloud processing."
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Functional Entity (ISO 23247) for message serialization and protocol alignment between ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

instance SensorDataFusionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables fusion of LiDAR and camera data into object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorFusionData
]

instance AccControlLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables execution of ACC control logic in digital twin for computation offloading."
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks."
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables external SQL database storage for time-series data."
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables generation of human-readable reports from object tracks and vehicle state data."
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects real-time data from physical twin including ego vehicle state and object tracks via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataCollectionInsight
]

instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Translates and aligns message types between ROS2 and Wi-Fi communication protocols."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance AccControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes ACC logic in digital twin with computation offloading from physical twin's Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:provides AccControlInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides UI-based control of ACC functionality including enable/disable and desired speed setting."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores ego vehicle state and object tracks in external SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of transmitted data from physical twin including vehicle state and object tracks."
]

instance DataTranslationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Successful translation and alignment of message types between ROS2 and Wi-Fi protocols."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path in 3D UI."
]

instance AccControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of ACC decisions including speed adjustments and braking actions."
]

instance RemoteControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "UI-based control interface for ACC enable/disable and desired speed adjustment."
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated human-readable reports containing object tracks and vehicle state time-series data."
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Stored time-series data of vehicle state and object tracks in external SQL database."
]

instance PerformanceAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time performance monitoring of ACC decisions including speed adjustments and braking."
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic capabilities using data collection and reporting to identify sensor failures or tracking errors."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of desired speed or ACC enable/disable states via control panel."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking triggered through digital twin's actuation functional entity."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C17: Environments/Components
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin entity deployed externally for computation offloading and remote management."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom Physical Twin Entity (ISO 23247 extension) hosting all sensing and actuation components."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin (DT) to the physical twin (PT) include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DT, sent back to the PT for motor actuation.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** in the PT.
  - **Actuation signals** (motor voltage, steering commands) executed by the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity** (custom extension of ISO 23247)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time synchronization** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency** ≤ **100 ms** (from PT to DT Entity) to support real-time computation offloading, as per **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for V2V communication.
  - **Clock synchronization** accuracy of **100 ms** between PT and DT components to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems.
  - **Perception cycle updates** for object tracks and vehicle state (frequency not explicitly stated but implied to be high for real-time ACC)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows the **ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA)** with custom adaptations:
  - **Physical Twin Entity** (custom): Hosts **sensing (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuation (motor, steering)**, and **data pre-processing** (point cloud clustering/tracking).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Implements **data collection**, **ACC control**, **reporting**, and **visualization pre-processing**.
  - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** interfaces (split from the monolithic **User Interface FE** in ISO 23247).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication.
  - **Deployment**: Components deployed across **PT (Jetson Orin Nano)**, **DT (external cloud/edge)**, and **User Entity (UI)**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and simulators (e.g., **CREO Simulate** for predictive maintenance in other use cases).
  - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system prognosis in referenced works).
  - **Representation Phase**: Represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization of vehicle state and object tracks. No explicit mention of **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **100 ms latency** and **clock sync** ensure temporal fidelity for ACC operations.
  - **Data Accuracy**: **Kalman filtering** and **DBSCAN clustering** improve object track fidelity.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**: Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC (performance class I) and **3GPP 22.185** for latency.
  - **Uncertainty**: Not explicitly quantified, but implied via **hardware limitations** (e.g., 100 ms clock sync accuracy).
  - **Verification**: Demonstrated via **public artifacts** (code, demo) and adherence to **ROS2** and **ISO 23247** standards."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Intra-System (PT)**: **ROS2** network for communication between **Jetson Orin Nano**, sensors, and actuators.
  - **Inter-System (PT ↔ DT)**: **Wi-Fi** for low-latency (<100 ms) data exchange between PT and DT Entity.
  - **Protocols**: **UDP/TCP** (implied via ROS2/Wi-Fi) for real-time data streams.
  - **Data Translation**: Custom **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Onboard **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** with **ROS2** middleware.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally (cloud/edge) for computation offloading, with **SQL database** for data storage.
  - **User Entity**: Hosted on a separate system for **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** interfaces.
  - **Hardware Constraints**: **100 ms clock synchronization** and **<100 ms latency** dictate deployment choices."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited to:
  - **ROS2 Middleware**: Enables modular integration of **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering)**, and **control logic (ACC)**.
  - **No explicit external systems**: No mention of integration with **ERP**, **PLM**, or other automotive ecosystems beyond the PT-DT constellation.
  - **Data Exchange**: Primarily internal to the DT system (e.g., PT ↔ DT ↔ User Entity)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247 (Part 2)**: Reference Architecture for Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, adapted for automotive use (e.g., **entity-based structure**, **Functional Entities**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements (performance class I implemented).
  - **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185**: Service requirements for **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (100 ms latency constraint).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for robotics and autonomous systems.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Implied as a potential alternative for **Data Translation FE** (though not explicitly used in this case)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Safety-Critical Operations**: ACC and emergency braking are executed with **<100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock sync** to mitigate risks.
  - **Remote Management**: **Human-in-the-Loop** design (as per **Liberty to act vs. Ability to act** taxonomy) ensures operator oversight for critical actions (e.g., emergency braking).
  - **Data Integrity**: **Clock synchronization** and **real-time validation** (e.g., object track consistency) reduce risks of erroneous commands.
  - **No Explicit Cybersecurity Measures**: No mention of encryption, authentication, or intrusion detection for PT-DT communication.
  - **Hardware Limitations**: **100 ms clock sync accuracy** may introduce risks in stricter safety-critical applications (e.g., full autonomy)."
]
